Kit1_measurements.value: Ten concentration measurements taken with assay kit 1 on ten specimens
Kit1_measurements.description: Concentration measurements of ten specimens using the first assay kit. These measurements are paired with Kit2_measurements as they are taken on the same ten specimens.

Kit2_measurements.value: Ten concentration measurements taken with assay kit 2 on ten specimens
Kit2_measurements.description: Concentration measurements of ten specimens using the second assay kit. These measurements are paired with Kit1_measurements as they are taken on the same ten specimens.
